SEARCH
Package cpdt.backend.controllers

Class TelemetryController

java.lang.Object
cpdt.backend.controllers.TelemetryController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/telemetry") public class TelemetryController extends Object
Exposes REST endpoints for querying historical telemetry data.

This controller provides access to telemetry records collected by the backend. Clients can retrieve telemetry history for individual devices or query measurements within a specific process area over a given time interval.

The controller delegates all data retrieval operations to the telemetry query service.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Lakshmi Sanjeev

    getAreaTelemetry(ProcessArea processArea, long since, int limit)

    Retrieves telemetry history for a specific device.

  • Method Details

    • getTelemetryHistory

      @GetMapping("/{deviceId}") public List<TelemetryEntity> getTelemetryHistory(@PathVariable String deviceId, @RequestParam(defaultValue="100") int limit)
      Retrieves telemetry history for a specific device.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the unique identifier of the device
      limit - the maximum number of telemetry records to return
      Returns:
      a list containing historical telemetry measurements

    • getAreaTelemetry

      @GetMapping("/area/{processArea}") public List<TelemetryEntity> getAreaTelemetry(@PathVariable ProcessArea processArea, @RequestParam long since, @RequestParam(defaultValue="100") int limit)
      Retrieves telemetry history for a process area.
      Parameters:
      processArea - the process area to query
      since - the earliest timestamp to include
      limit - the maximum number of telemetry records to return
      Returns:
      a list containing telemetry measurements for the specified area
